The '''Dammant Killers''' were an armaments company based on [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]], known for its missiles. The company was decades old as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Their main factory was in [[Cartann City]]. In 40 ABY it was [[Mission to Adumar|found out]] by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] that they were building missiles beyond [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] quota and supplying them to [[Planet/Legends|planets]] threatening to buck GA authority. The findings of the missions were then reported to GA authorities.

{{Company-stub}}
